title: adam & eesa Sticky Pest Control Traps - Pack of 5 Sticky Trap Boards - Extra Strong Multi-Use Gum Sticky Pads - Effective Pest Control Traps for Indoor and Outdoor, Garden, Home and Kitchen
bullet_points: EFFICIENT PEST CONTROL – Effectively capture pests with these easy-to-use traps. Each piece provides ample surface area for pest control. Ideal for various settings to maintain a clean and safe environment.

IDEAL FOR VARIOUS LOCATIONS – Perfect for homes, gardens, restaurants, bars, farms, offices, warehouses, kitchens, and meeting rooms. Ideal for placement behind appliances, under sinks, near garbage areas, or any location prone to pests, ensuring comprehensive coverage

EASY AND DURABLE SETUP – Separate the boards and add bait in the middle. Recommended bait includes peanut butter, fruit, meat, cookies, cheese, and sausage. The thick cardboard ensures durability and effectiveness, providing a long-lasting pest control solution.

MAXIMIZE EFFECTIVENESS – Place several traps in multiple locations for better results. Using 2-3 pieces in each spot can significantly enhance efficiency, increasing the likelihood of capturing pests and maintaining a pest-free environment

VERSATILE DESIGN – Fold into a tunnel for narrow areas or leave flat to cover larger spaces and provide a larger surface area. This versatile design adapts to various spaces, ensuring optimal pest control in both compact and open areas
